core.purpose: General qiaomu-ppt style presets for normal deck planning and rendering.
core.use_when: Default for broad topic decks, business reports, courseware, talks, and product releases.

magazine.purpose: Editorial and art-direction presets for magazine-like Chinese reading decks.
magazine.use_when: Use for culture, lifestyle, fashion, essay, and visual storytelling decks.

ppt_master_cases.purpose: Compact case-derived style abstractions learned from ppt-master examples.
ppt_master_cases.use_when: Use when the user asks for higher-end PPT craft, keynote texture, or case-style visual language.

32kw_bento.purpose: Bento/grid style seeds for dense product, dashboard, and AI-tool launch decks.
32kw_bento.use_when: Add with --pack 32kw_bento when the brief explicitly asks for bento, modular cards, or 32kw-style visual seeds.

ppt_master_examples.purpose: Reference catalog for judging example scale, media density, page rhythm, and production expectations.
ppt_master_examples.use_when: Use as a research/reference pack, not as a default style recommendation library.

notebooklm_styles.purpose: NotebookLM-native style prompts for explicit NotebookLM deck generation.
notebooklm_styles.use_when: Use only on the NotebookLM-native route.

html_motion.purpose: Motion presets for explicit semantic HTML or HTML-motion routes.
html_motion.use_when: Use only when the requested deliverable includes HTML motion.
